events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: commercial project, structural framing, missing jack studs, tested/inspected stage. Reference IRC R502 (floor framing) and R602 (wall framing). Missing jack studs is non-compliant with framing requirements where jack studs are required to support headers. This is a structural defect. Decision fail, risk high/critical. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 90. Value 0. Confidence high.
